title: UCDP Participates in WKPI Regional Peace Forum
summary: Representatives from UCDP joined partner organisations at the WKPI annual regional forum.
content:
Representatives from UCDP joined partner organisations at the Western Kenya Peace Initiative (WKPI) annual regional forum.

The forum brought together community leaders, civil society organisations, and youth representatives to discuss peacebuilding efforts across the region.

## About WKPI

The Western Kenya Peace Initiative is one of UCDP's flagship programmes, focused on conflict prevention, dialogue, and community cohesion in Kisumu and the wider western Kenya region.

*Update this article with full details of the forum discussions and outcomes.*
